description: Log in to Moodle as admin (username: admin, password: Admin1234!) at http://localhost/moodle and navigate to the course "Introduction to Chemistry" (CHEM101). Create a sequential learning path consisting of three Page activities: "Module 1: Lab Safety Fundamentals" (Content: "Safety rules and PPE requirements."), "Module 2: Chemical Handling Procedures" (Content: "Proper handling and storage of chemicals."), and "Module 3: Emergency Response Protocols" (Content: "Spill response and first aid."). Each activity must have completion tracking enabled and be restricted so that it is only accessible once the preceding module in the sequence has been completed.
